commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Ruben. No mention is made of those of the half tribe of Manasses. Perhaps they only joined the rest afterwards, chap. v. 33. They occupied the northern parts. (Haydock)
The Hebrew has here a solecism, "the sons of Gad he said "to avoid which, Onkelos adds, the tribe (Houbigant)
